data.name: The Legend of Zuri
data.detailed_description:
The Legend of Zuri is a "pick a path" style raunchy adventure with over 180 CG images, 69 achievements and over 18 months of cooking in the oven. Princess Zuri will encounter giants, orcs and other crazed creatures during her travels. You will choose how she lives or dies and who she marries in the end.

Supported by her potty-mouthed fairy servant Siofra, Zuri will encounter a variety of fantasy creatures, lewd bar patrons and suitors while trying to maintain her composure. Zuri has plenty of opportunities to make the wrong decision that end her adventure prematurely but that is all part of the fun.

Did you enjoy the trips to the bar, the servants or the excitement? Save and load as needed, you'll find the path to the end you desire.

All characters are 18 years or older.

data.short_description: The Legend of Zuri is a "pick a path" style raunchy adventure with over 180 CG images. Will the Princess Zuri remain unsullied or will she experience something unmentionable? That depends on which paths you choose!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 1.6 GHZ 4th Gen
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Tested on 6 year old Laptop
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mojave
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHZ Core i5
  • 顯示卡: Intel Iris
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Some transitions my run slower on lower end machines, but it will not impact gameplay

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 1.6 GHZ 4th Gen
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 400 MB available space
